title: ExternalDataTranObject - Metadata API
description: Represents a definition of a Data 360 schema object. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

availabilityStatus.description: Represents the availability of the object. Valid values are: Available In_Use

creationType.description: Describes whether this object was added by the Customer or as part of a Standard Taxonomy or by the System. Valid values are: Segment_Membership Activation_Audience (Reserved for internal use only) Custom Standard System Derived Bridge Curated Standard Valid values available in API version 62.0 and later are: ADG Calculated_Insight CG_Audience Chunk Directory_Table External Semantic Transform Vector_Embedding

extDataTranObjectTemplate.description: and read-only. Reference to the associated ExtDataTranObjectTemplate data kit object. The system populates this field when a data kit that contains a data stream is deployed.

externalDataTranFields.description: Stores the fields related to that schema object.

masterLabel.description: The UI name for the object.

mktDataTranObject.description: An entity that is used to transport information from the source to a target.

objectCategory.description: Reference to the Object Category. For Transport, they're Profile, Engagement, or Other.

creationType.description: Describes whether this object was added by the Customer or as part of a Standard Taxonomy or by the System. Valid values are: Segment_Membership Custom Standard System Derived Bridge Curated

datatype.description: Phone, currency, number, or other assigned type.

dateFormat.description: The Date format of date, time, date/time fields in this Transport field.

extDataTranFieldTemplate.description: and read-only. Reference to the associated ExtDataTranFieldTemplate data kit object. The system populates this field when a data kit that contains a data stream is deployed.

externalName.description: Name of the object in the external system (different from Developer Name).

isCurrencyIsoCode.description: If true, this field is a currency ISO code.

isDataRequired.description: If true, data is required for this field.

precision.description: Used for currency and numeric accuracy.

primaryIndexOrder.description: If supplied, indicates this field is part of the primary key where the number value (starting at 1) indicates the order of attributes if it's a compound primary key. Missing value means this field isn’t part of the primary key.

sequence.description: The sequence of this source schema.
